heading: Syntax
body:
The following tabs show the syntax of the analyzer options you can configure in your index definition:

Index Analyzer

Search Analyzer

Multi Analyzer

Custom Analyzer

> **See Also:** 
>
> Learn by Watching
>
> Watch this video to see how MongoDB Search uses analyzers to break documents into
> searchable units and build an inverted index.
>
> *Duration: 8 Minutes*
>
> [https://youtu.be/XrJG994YxD8](https://youtu.be/XrJG994YxD8)
